public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as inventory steward.
appearance: Jalen Mere carries the marks of inventory steward in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a inventory steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of inventory steward in and around Sanctuary of Shadows, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Sanctuary of Shadows while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Jalen Mere can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Jalen Mere can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Jalen Mere carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sanctuary of Shadows: the part of Sanctuary of Shadows where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break

first_impression: Jalen Mere presents as Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a inventory steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Inventory Steward, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Jalen Mere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Inventory Steward too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Jalen Mere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Jalen Mere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Jalen Mere is Known locally through day-to-day work as inventory steward. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Inventory Steward.
social_texture: Jalen Mere speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Sanctuary of Shadows, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Jalen touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Jalen Mere when the party needs a socially grounded face for Sanctuary of Shadows: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
